message:
chore(beads): Close Phase 6 Action Execution System

Closed beads:
- process_triage-sj6.8: Supervisor-aware action executors (complete)
- process_triage-sj6: EPIC Phase 6 (all acceptance criteria verified)

Phase 6 unblocks 9+ downstream issues including:
- Phase 7 (UX), Phase 8 (Safety), Phase 9 (Shadow Mode)
- Dormant daemon, CLI E2E tests, documentation, packaging

Added review comment to process_triage-t6lf (session continuity).
